questionHtml:
Dinitrogen monoxide, N2O, causes depletion of ozone in the stratosphere.

The Lewis (electron dot) structure of the dinitrogen monoxide molecule can be represented as:

Deduce the hybridization of the central nitrogen atom in the molecule.

meta.title: Deduce the hybridization of the central nitrogen atom in the molecule.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure

Structure 2.2.16—Hybridization is the concept of mixing atomic orbitals to form new hybrid orbitals for bonding. Analyse the hybridization and bond formation in molecules and ions. Identify the relationships between Lewis formulas, electron domains, molecular geometry and type of hybridization. Predict the geometry around an atom from its hybridization, and vice versa.
